records.m_Talk_ENG: Counters! We're almost at the floating island you requested!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Counters! We're almost at the floating island you requested!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Counters! We're almost at the floating island you requested!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone, hold on tight!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone, hold on tight!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone, hold on tight!

records.m_Talk_ENG: K-kyaaah...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: K-kyaaah...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: K-kyaaah...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: N-no good! The turbulence from the Grand Dimension Crevice is shaking us too much!
records.m_Talk_DEU: N-no good! The turbulence from the Grand Dimension Crevice is shaking us too much!
records.m_Talk_FRA: N-no good! The turbulence from the Grand Dimension Crevice is shaking us too much!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The anti-gravity field is too strong! We won't be able to land the transport helicopter directly on the island!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The anti-gravity field is too strong! We won't be able to land the transport helicopter directly on the island!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The anti-gravity field is too strong! We won't be able to land the transport helicopter directly on the island!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Get us in as close as you can! Just skim right along the edge of the island!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Get us in as close as you can! Just skim right along the edge of the island!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Get us in as close as you can! Just skim right along the edge of the island!

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-wait, what?! You're not planning to jump, are you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-wait, what?! You're not planning to jump, are you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-wait, what?! You're not planning to jump, are you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If anything goes wrong, the updraft could sweep you straight into the Grand Dimension Crevice!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If anything goes wrong, the updraft could sweep you straight into the Grand Dimension Crevice!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If anything goes wrong, the updraft could sweep you straight into the Grand Dimension Crevice!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry about us, pilot!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry about us, pilot!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry about us, pilot!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've got it all figured out, trust me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've got it all figured out, trust me!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've got it all figured out, trust me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I-is this!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I-is this!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I-is this!

records.m_Talk_ENG: "I-is this really safe...?"
records.m_Talk_DEU: "I-is this really safe...?"
records.m_Talk_FRA: "I-is this really safe...?"

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...is what Lady Sita says, sounding uneasy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...is what Lady Sita says, sounding uneasy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...is what Lady Sita says, sounding uneasy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha! Don't sweat it! A little thrill's part of being a treasure hunter!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha! Don't sweat it! A little thrill's part of being a treasure hunter!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha! Don't sweat it! A little thrill's part of being a treasure hunter!

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right! Finally time to use this! The Legacy Cube!
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right! Finally time to use this! The Legacy Cube!
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right! Finally time to use this! The Legacy Cube!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's see... this thing can pull gear straight from the Counters Legacy server, right...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's see... this thing can pull gear straight from the Counters Legacy server, right...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's see... this thing can pull gear straight from the Counters Legacy server, right...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, perfect! Just what we need!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, perfect! Just what we need!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, perfect! Just what we need!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm... kinda wish it had some flashy activation chant. Would look way cooler...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm... kinda wish it had some flashy activation chant. Would look way cooler...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm... kinda wish it had some flashy activation chant. Would look way cooler...

records.m_Talk_ENG: M-Ms. Mi Rinae! I think we should hurry!
records.m_Talk_DEU: M-Ms. Mi Rinae! I think we should hurry!
records.m_Talk_FRA: M-Ms. Mi Rinae! I think we should hurry!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, yeah, all right. I'll just wing it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, yeah, all right. I'll just wing it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, yeah, all right. I'll just wing it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come on out, Boraemon! <color=#ffd34c>Magical Zipline</color>...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come on out, Boraemon! <color=#ffd34c>Magical Zipline</color>...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come on out, Boraemon! <color=#ffd34c>Magical Zipline</color>...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stop it. Don't call me that...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stop it. Don't call me that...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stop it. Don't call me that...

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's embarrassing. We're adults now, Mi Rinae.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's embarrassing. We're adults now, Mi Rinae.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's embarrassing. We're adults now, Mi Rinae.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! Who cares if we're adults? I'm still young at heart! Just beam it over already!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! Who cares if we're adults? I'm still young at heart! Just beam it over already!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! Who cares if we're adults? I'm still young at heart! Just beam it over already!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Ugh.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Ugh.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Ugh.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Accessing Counters Legacy server. Activating Overlord...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Accessing Counters Legacy server. Activating Overlord...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Accessing Counters Legacy server. Activating Overlord...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Realize ready... Countdown... Five, four, three, two, one...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Realize ready... Countdown... Five, four, three, two, one...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Realize ready... Countdown... Five, four, three, two, one...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whoa! It actually worked! That's amazing!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whoa! It actually worked! That's amazing!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whoa! It actually worked! That's amazing!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks, Boraemon! All right, Magical Zipline, fire...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks, Boraemon! All right, Magical Zipline, fire...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks, Boraemon! All right, Magical Zipline, fire...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes! Got a solid anchor!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes! Got a solid anchor!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes! Got a solid anchor!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...W-wait...
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...W-wait...
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...W-wait...

records.m_Talk_ENG: "W-wait, you're really going to ride that down to the floating island?"
records.m_Talk_DEU: "W-wait, you're really going to ride that down to the floating island?"
records.m_Talk_FRA: "W-wait, you're really going to ride that down to the floating island?"

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...is what Lady Sita asks in disbelief.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...is what Lady Sita asks in disbelief.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...is what Lady Sita asks in disbelief.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yup! What could be more fun and thrilling than this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yup! What could be more fun and thrilling than this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yup! What could be more fun and thrilling than this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Robin, make sure you keep those two safe, all right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Robin, make sure you keep those two safe, all right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Robin, make sure you keep those two safe, all right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, understood, Ms. Mi Rinae.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, understood, Ms. Mi Rinae.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, understood, Ms. Mi Rinae.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right, here we go!
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right, here we go!
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right, here we go!

records.m_Talk_DEU: Hold on tight, everyone! If you fall, I'm not taking responsibility!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ow...! Bad landing... Right on my butt...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ow...! Bad landing... Right on my butt...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ow...! Bad landing... Right on my butt...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone all right...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone all right...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone all right...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahaha... I'm fine at least...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahaha... I'm fine at least...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahaha... I'm fine at least...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Hmph!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Hmph!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Hmph!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Looks like Lady Sita's upset.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Looks like Lady Sita's upset.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Looks like Lady Sita's upset.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha... Maybe that was a bit much for a civilian.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha... Maybe that was a bit much for a civilian.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha... Maybe that was a bit much for a civilian.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry! Once the mission's over, we'll head back in a safer way.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry! Once the mission's over, we'll head back in a safer way.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry! Once the mission's over, we'll head back in a safer way.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But for now...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But for now...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But for now...

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Organic beings detected. Checking vital signs.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Organic beings detected. Checking vital signs.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Organic beings detected. Checking vital signs.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: That thing's our first target.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That thing's our first target.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That thing's our first target.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, that giant robot...! I've seen it before!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, that giant robot...! I've seen it before!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, that giant robot...! I've seen it before!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's like one of those good robots from Masked Counter, except it's been taken over by villains!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's like one of those good robots from Masked Counter, except it's been taken over by villains!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's like one of those good robots from Masked Counter, except it's been taken over by villains!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, yeah. Sounds about right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, yeah. Sounds about right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, yeah. Sounds about right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That beetle was designed to roam the Counterside hunting C.O.s.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That beetle was designed to roam the Counterside hunting C.O.s.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That beetle was designed to roam the Counterside hunting C.O.s.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But now it looks like it's hunting people too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But now it looks like it's hunting people too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But now it looks like it's hunting people too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Vital signs checked. Unable to verify Corruption Syndrome symptoms.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Vital signs checked. Unable to verify Corruption Syndrome symptoms.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Vital signs checked. Unable to verify Corruption Syndrome symptoms.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: But to bring down a giant robot... don't we need a giant robot too?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But to bring down a giant robot... don't we need a giant robot too?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But to bring down a giant robot... don't we need a giant robot too?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, that's one way to see it...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, that's one way to see it...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, that's one way to see it...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But CRF attacks from a Counter hit it hardest.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But CRF attacks from a Counter hit it hardest.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But CRF attacks from a Counter hit it hardest.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So we end this quick with <color=#ffd34c>Aurafication</color>, Robin...!

records.m_Talk_FRA: So we end this quick with <color=#ffd34c>Aurafication</color>, Robin...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aurafication...! Then this fight must be that important...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aurafication...! Then this fight must be that important...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aurafication...! Then this fight must be that important...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Understood! Leave this to me and Ms. Aura!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, that giant robot...! I've seen it before!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, that giant robot...! I've seen it before!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, that giant robot...! I've seen it before!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's like one of those good robots from Masked Counter, except it's been taken over by villains!
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's like one of those good robots from Masked Counter, except it's been taken over by villains!
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's like one of those good robots from Masked Counter, except it's been taken over by villains!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, yeah. Sounds about right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, yeah. Sounds about right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, yeah. Sounds about right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That beetle was designed to roam the Counterside hunting C.O.s.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That beetle was designed to roam the Counterside hunting C.O.s.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That beetle was designed to roam the Counterside hunting C.O.s.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But now it looks like it's hunting people too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But now it looks like it's hunting people too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But now it looks like it's hunting people too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Vital signs checked. Unable to verify Corruption Syndrome symptoms.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Vital signs checked. Unable to verify Corruption Syndrome symptoms.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Vital signs checked. Unable to verify Corruption Syndrome symptoms.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: But to bring down a giant robot... don't we need a giant robot too?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But to bring down a giant robot... don't we need a giant robot too?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But to bring down a giant robot... don't we need a giant robot too?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, that's one way to see it...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well, that's one way to see it...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, that's one way to see it...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But CRF attacks from a Counter hit it hardest.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But CRF attacks from a Counter hit it hardest.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But CRF attacks from a Counter hit it hardest.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So we end this quick with <color=#ffd34c>Aurafication</color>, Robin...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: So we end this quick with <color=#ffd34c>Aurafication</color>, Robin...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: So we end this quick with <color=#ffd34c>Aurafication</color>, Robin...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Aurafication...! Then this fight must be that important...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Aurafication...! Then this fight must be that important...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Aurafication...! Then this fight must be that important...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Understood! Leave this to me and Ms. Aura!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Understood! Leave this to me and Ms. Aura!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Understood! Leave this to me and Ms. Aura!
